use_cases: Collecting author or writer information for blog posts and articles
Managing contributor profiles in a content management system
Adding writer details to editorial or publishing platforms
Setting up authorship for content creation workflows
Onboarding new writers to a platform with profile information
ai_summary: A card-based form component for collecting author and writer information including name, title, and avatar image. Built with shadcn/ui components and enhanced with smooth Framer Motion fade-in animations with staggered children. Features an intuitive layout with validation-capable inputs and a dismissible card interface, ideal for content management systems, editorial platforms, and blogging applications.
